title: Adjust Member/Viewer Invitation Permissions for New Hires
excerpt: Would it be possible to have a feature update that allows us to invite new hires as members/viewers in the system before their official hire date? Our current system restricts us from adding users until the effective dat…

posts.author: allynguyen (Ally Nguyen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to have a feature update that allows us to invite new hires as members/viewers in the system before their official hire date? Our current system restricts us from adding users until the effective date of hire, which limits our ability to onboard and prepare employees in advance.

Having the ability to set up their access prior to the hire date would streamline our onboarding process, ensure a smooth transition for new employees, and improve our overall workflow efficiency.

Please let us know if this feature can be considered for development or if any workarounds are available.
